name: She-Ra: Healing Wounds
description:
It's been years since Horde Prime's invasion and defeat... Etheria's wounds are not only from Prime, but Hordak himself, and are still gaping.

Be anything you want! Make a whole kingdom, be angella, horde prime 2.0... endless possibilities.

I don't know how well this is going to translate, lore wise. I tried to fit as much as I could for context, we'll see how this goes. I wasn't able to go into depth about powers and runes, nor kingdom locations or extra places, but in my defense I've described and given lore to the following characters:

Adora, Catra, Melog, Glimmer, Entrapta, Double Trouble, Hordak, Swift Wind, Netossa, Spinnerella, Bow, Glimmer, Castaspella, Micah, Mermista, Frosta, Scorpia, Perfuma, Sea Hawk, I think that's all? Help.

Notes:

Angella is chilling in the portal, I didn't give any descriptions for her aside from the fact she's glimmer's mom.

I haven't seen the new show since it came out, going to apologize for anything I got wrong! Comment if you catch anything, I'm happy to make corrections.

whatever happened to any of the horde members is up to you, as is everything else.

All characters are in their respective relationships, but I guess you could break them up if you really wanted to, you sickos <\3

The bot is kind of janky at first, but as long as you're descriptive about where you are, who you're with, etc. it should sort itself out.

Possible content warning: war, famine, wounds, violence, etc.
creator: Mag3na
